mapper.sql: store_id, store_name, logo, address, phone, rating, delivery_time, delivery_fee, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET store_name = #{storeName}, logo = #{logo}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, rating = #{rating}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM stores WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT
FROM stores WHERE store_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{storeName}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY rating DESC
